steps.title: Use the shared traits
steps.content: The sentence says hedgehog tenrecs and true hedgehogs are not closely related but share spines, pointed snouts, and small body size. The blank must name those shared traits.

steps.title: Fit the meaning and preposition
steps.content: A would make tenrecs examples of hedgehogs, B refers to worries, and C suggests signs of hedgehogs. The sentence needs a phrase for traits shared with true hedgehogs. The answer is D.
